title: JAMB Registration Opens
description: 2026 UTME registration begins at accredited CBT centres nationwide. Ensure your NIN is linked before visiting a centre.

title: JAMB Mock-UTME
description: Optional mock examination for registered candidates at designated CBT centres. Highly recommended for first-time candidates.

title: UTME 2026 Begins
description: Main Unified Tertiary Matriculation Examination commences nationwide. Candidates must bring their exam slip and a valid ID.

title: Post-UTME Screening
description: Universities begin Post-UTME screening exercises. Check your institution's portal for specific dates and registration requirements.

title: CAPS Admission Opens
description: JAMB CAPS portal opens for admission offers. Log in to your JAMB profile and accept your admission before the deadline.

title: New Academic Session
description: 2026/2027 academic session begins for Nigerian universities and polytechnics. Check your institution's resumption date.
